description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with global image node:10 and stages test, build, and deploy. In the build stage add an Alpine Build job (only on tags) that runs npm i --unsafe-perm and npx pkg -t latest-alpine . with NODE_ENV=dev and publishes the jdrive artifact; a Linux Build job (only on tags) extending the .Linux Build template which runs npm i --unsafe-perm and npx pkg -t linux . with NODE_ENV=dev and also publishes jdrive; a Linux Test Build job extending the same template that runs the same commands but excludes tag pipelines; a Build npm tarball job that sets NODE_ENV=production, runs npm pack -q|xargs -I {} mv {} jdrive.tgz and stores jdrive.tgz as an artifact; and a pages job that runs only on the master branch, installs jsdoc with npm i --no-save jsdoc, removes any existing public directory, generates documentation with npx jsdoc . lib -d public and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. In the test stage add Test Node 11, Test Node LTS, and Test Node latest jobs, each extending the .testcode template, using images node:11, node:lts, and node:latest respectively, and executing npm ci --unsafe-perm, npm test, and npm run lint; also add a sast job using docker:stable image with docker:stable-dind service, allowed to fail, that exports SP_VERSION and runs a Docker SAST scanner, producing gl-sast-report.json as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a Deploy to NPM job (only on tags) that writes the NPM auth token to .npmrc and runs npm publish to the npm registry.
